shopping_109.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The objective was to add "these items" (scissors and tape) to the comparison page. The agent only searched for and added "scissors" to the comparison page, failing to identify and add the "tape" as well. The agent stopped prematurely after adding only one type of item.
shopping_109.REFLECTION: When the objective specifies "these items" and provides an image with multiple distinct objects, ensure all identifiable objects are searched for and added to the comparison page. Do not assume the task is complete after finding only one of the items. In this case, both "scissors" and "tape" should have been added.
shopping_109.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The objective was to add "these items" (scissors and tape) to the comparison page. The agent only searched for and added "scissors" to the comparison page, failing to identify and add the "tape" as well. The agent stopped prematurely after adding only one type of item.

REFLECTION:
When the objective specifies "these items" and provides an image with multiple distinct objects, ensure all identifiable objects are searched for and added to the comparison page. Do not assume the task is complete after finding only one of the items. In this case, both "scissors" and "tape" should have been added.
